markdown service discovery page.
Primary domain: https://markdown.platphormnews.com

Overview:
This endpoint supports public discovery and AI-readiness tooling for the markdown service in the PlatPhorm News network.

Useful endpoints:
- https://markdown.platphormnews.com/
- https://markdown.platphormnews.com/support
- https://markdown.platphormnews.com/status
- https://markdown.platphormnews.com/faq
- https://markdown.platphormnews.com/api/health
- https://markdown.platphormnews.com/api/v1/health
- https://markdown.platphormnews.com/api/docs
- https://markdown.platphormnews.com/openapi.yaml
- https://markdown.platphormnews.com/openapi.json
- https://markdown.platphormnews.com/llms.txt
- https://markdown.platphormnews.com/llms-full.txt
- https://markdown.platphormnews.com/robots.txt
- https://markdown.platphormnews.com/sitemap.xml
- https://markdown.platphormnews.com/rss.xml
- https://markdown.platphormnews.com/feed.xml
- https://markdown.platphormnews.com/.well-known/mcp.json
- https://markdown.platphormnews.com/.well-known/agents.json
